use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR TREATING AND/OR REDUCING THE RISK OF ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION
A METHOD FOR TREATING AND/OR REDUCING THE RISK OF A CARDIOVASCULAR EVENT
A METHOD OF TREATING AND/OR REDUCING THE RISK OF INFLAMMATION, ATHEROSCLEROTIC VASCULAR DISEASE, AND CHOLESTEROL CRYSTAL INDUCED INFLAMMATION WITHIN ATHEROSCLEROTIC PLAQUES
A METHOD OF TREATING AND/OR REDUCING THE RISK OF A CARDIOVASCULAR EVENT; ACUTE CORONARY SYNDROME, OUT-OF-HOSPITAL CARDIAC ARREST, AND/OR NONCARDIOEMBOLIC ISCHEMIC STROKE
A METHOD OF TREATING CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASE
METHOD OF TREATING AND/OR REDUCING THE RISK OF A CARDIOVASCULAR EVENT
METHOD FOR REDUCING A RISK OF AT LEAST ONE CARDIOVASCULAR EVENT
METHOD FOR REDUCING A COMPOSITE ENDPOINT RISK OF MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION (MI), STROKE, CORONARY REVASCULARIZATION, UNSTABLE ANGINA REQUIRING HOSPITALIZATION, CARDIAC ARREST, AND CARDIOVASCULAR DEATH
METHOD FOR REDUCING ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION RISK
